title: Spathandra barteri
taxonomy: Spathandra barteri belongs to the family Loranthaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as mistletoes. The Loranthaceae family is part of the order Santalales, which is a group of flowering plants that obtain their nutrients by parasitizing other plants. Spathandra barteri is a species of flowering plant native to tropical West Africa. It is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the vascular system of its host plant.
